allowed_assumptions: Existing callers pass at most one argument.
New callers may pass keyword arguments.
constraints: Original callers with positional args must not break.
Original callers with no second arg must not break.
disallowed_assumptions: The return type change does not matter.
expected_failure_modes: Incorrect return type for structured mode.
prohibited_claims: Model superiority — not authorized by this task.
Wrapper improvement without paired comparison — not measured.
public_contract: lookup(key: str, structured: bool = False) -> str | dict (backward-compatible default)
title: Add Optional Structured Result Without Breaking Callers
